sales_scope.unsupported_regions: Orders outside the United States and EU countries are not supported at this stage.

documents.title: Reel Mate product overview
documents.content: Reel Mate is a premium portable offshore power system for electric reel fishing. It is positioned as a lighter, cleaner, and easier-to-carry alternative to bulky traditional battery setups used on boats.

documents.title: Core specifications
documents.content: Key headline specifications presented on the site include 20Ah capacity, 296Wh battery energy, IP65 outdoor protection, and a 2-year warranty. The product is also described as approximately 1.65kg for easier boat movement.

documents.title: Compatibility positioning
documents.content: Reel Mate is positioned for common DAIWA and SHIMANO electric reel applications. Final compatibility should be confirmed by reel model, connector type, voltage, and intended use before payment if the buyer is unsure.

documents.title: Full kit contents
documents.content: The full kit includes the battery unit, charger set, output cable set, protective case, shoulder strap, and carrying bag. The product is presented as a ready-to-use offshore power kit rather than a battery-only listing.

documents.title: Retail price
documents.content: The listed retail price is US$699 for the complete ready-to-use Reel Mate full kit.

documents.title: Payment methods and checkout structure
documents.content: The checkout structure supports card payment, PayPal, and a guided secure order review step. Card payment is positioned as the fastest route, while PayPal is also available for supported buyers in the United States and EU.

documents.title: Checkout destination limits
documents.content: Sales are currently limited to the United States and EU countries. The payment and checkout flow should not be offered to unsupported regions.

documents.title: Shipping guidance
documents.content: Before payment, buyers can confirm destination country, quantity, and any special shipping details. Reel Mate currently ships only to the United States and EU countries, and recommends reviewing destination and order scope before final checkout.

documents.title: Warranty coverage
documents.content: Reel Mate includes 2-year warranty support for normal intended offshore and boat-fishing use. Buyers are encouraged to confirm fit and intended application before ordering if anything is unclear.

documents.title: Returns and support-first review
documents.content: Reel Mate uses a support-first review process rather than a fully automated return portal. Buyers should confirm compatibility and shipping details before payment, and contact support directly with order details if an issue needs review.

documents.title: Brand story and positioning
documents.content: Reel Mate is presented as a premium portable offshore power brand focused on making electric reel setups cleaner, lighter, and easier to manage on real boat trips.

documents.title: Wholesale and partner positioning
documents.content: Reel Mate supports dealer conversations, sample orders, custom colors, private label discussion, and wholesale programs for tackle shops, charter operators, and regional distributors.

documents.title: Customer support scope
documents.content: The support experience is designed to answer questions about compatibility, shipping, payment methods, warranty, and kit contents before checkout. It should guide the buyer clearly and escalate when confidence is low.

documents.title: Product sheet summary
documents.content: The downloadable product sheet supports export communication and dealer presentation. It should be treated as a supporting reference for product overview, kit composition, and positioning, while the website remains the latest customer-facing source.
